title: notifications-push — compliance evidence
description: Primary enforcement point for COPPA VPC on push to minors + GDPR Art. 32 encryption of device tokens.

controls.evidence: Marketing-priority pushes refused for recipients with consent_age_gate=minor_under_consent_age until VPC captured by compliance module. Every gate decision metric-tracked (academorix.notifications.push.coppa_gates.total).
retention.json applies 30d reduced hot window for minor subscriptions vs 90d for adults.
device_token encrypted at rest via AWS KMS. Never returned by API. Fingerprint (SHA-256) used for admin listings.
Consent for push notifications captured at OS-level (user granted app push permission) + at platform-level (marketing categories opt-in via preferences).
Same COPPA VPC gate applies for EU minors under consent age (16 by default; per-tenant override for member states).
subprocessors.json lists FCM (Google) + APNs (Apple) + Expo + OneSignal as processors.
device_token AES-256 encrypted via KMS. TLS 1.3 for provider requests. JWT/OAuth 2.0 for provider auth. Signature verification on inbound webhooks via webhook module.

wcag_2_2_aa.note: Push notifications rendered by the OS — accessibility is OS-provided. Client SDK ensures alert.title + alert.body are populated + not empty (which would violate SC 1.3.1 info + relationships).
